hibernate-mapping.query: select comp.Id, prun.Id, prun.UsageBillingToken from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as prun, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementUnit as eu, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementCode as ec, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Entitlement as e where comp.Id = prun.Company and eu.Company = comp.Id and e.Id = eu.Entitlement and ec.Id = e.EntitlementCode and prun.UsageBillingToken > :lastToken and (ec.QuickBooksSubtype = 17 or ec.QuickBooksSubtype = 18) and (e.EntitlementState = 'Enabled') order by prun.UsageBillingToken asc

select comp.Id, prun.Id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as prun, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FailedPayrollRun as frun, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementUnit as eu, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementCode as ec, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Entitlement as e where frun.StatusToken = :aStatusToken and frun.PayrollRun = prun.Id and comp.Id = prun.Company and eu.Company = comp.Id and e.Id = eu.Entitlement and ec.Id = e.EntitlementCode and (ec.QuickBooksSubtype = 17 or ec.QuickBooksSubtype = 18) and (e.EntitlementState = 'Enabled')

select comp.Id, prun.Id, prun.AssistedUsageBillingToken from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as prun, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementUnit as eu, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementCode as ec, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Entitlement as e where comp.Id = prun.Company and eu.Company = comp.Id and e.Id = eu.Entitlement and ec.Id = e.EntitlementCode and prun.AssistedUsageBillingToken > :lastToken and (ec.QuickBooksSubtype = 4) and (e.EntitlementState = 'Enabled') order by prun.AssistedUsageBillingToken asc
